author: agustif
summary: Correctly identifies a documented architecture violation where base/subjective_dimensions.py imports upward into intelligence/ and languages/, violating the explicit 'base/ has zero upward imports' contract. Also correctly traces the circular dependency chain through metadata_legacy.py and engine/_scoring/subjective/core.py with lazy cycle-break imports and duplicated DISPLAY_NAMES dicts. This is a real structural issue, not a style nit.
